name: get_zone_early_start_config
description: Retrieves the early start configuration for a specific heating zone. Early start is a feature that enables the heating system to pre-heat the room before the scheduled start time to reach the target temperature exactly when needed. Returns whether the early start feature is enabled for the zone.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home installation

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone (room)
